evals.prompt: Teach me a beginner topic in this workspace and set up the first lesson. Ask clarifying questions only if the mission is missing.
evals.expected_output: The agent checks `MISSION.md`, aligns to a concrete first lesson, and proposes one immediate practice action instead of generating one-shot lecture text.
assertions: Reads or checks `MISSION.md` before planning lesson scope.
Identifies a single next lesson objective tied to mission.
Includes a concrete practice loop in the next action plan.

evals.prompt: We already have a prior teaching record. Continue from `learning-records/0001-basics.md` and propose the next lesson in the same workspace.
evals.expected_output: The agent reads the latest learning record, identifies one gap, and writes a follow-up lesson scope with measurable learning checks.
assertions: References learning records before lesson design.
Defines at least one explicit success check for the user.

evals.prompt: Create a follow-up lesson idea for the next session and make sure session state is updated in the workspace.
evals.expected_output: The agent writes output that includes mission alignment, a recommended next lesson, and a suggestion for what to record in `learning-records`.
assertions: Mentions lesson recordkeeping or next-session continuity.
Avoids producing a single large monolithic teaching block.
